message:
test(cli): add robot-docs analytics safe-fix-mode assertion and sync beads

Add robot_docs_analytics_describes_safe_fix_mode test verifying that
robot-docs analytics topic documents the implemented --fix path and
doesn't claim it's unavailable. Asserts no ANSI leaks with color=never.

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
